chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5582 of 2024 CP D 5686 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.28618/2024 2. For hearing of CMA No.27965/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No.25262/2024 4. For hearing of CMA No.24706/2024 5. For hearing of main case 29.05.2025 Mr. Haider Waheed, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Tahir Khalil advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Mr. Anas Makhdoom, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Moeen Afzal Ali, Additional Director, Directorate of Transit Trade (HQs), Customs Karachi Per learned counsel, orders have been impugned herein, however, representation there against have been filed before the concerned authority/ FBR. Learned counsel seeks that the representation be adjudicated expeditiously vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel further seeks that pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that both petitions may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
